name: Runway
philosophy: An inspired interpretation of Runwai's design language — an editorial, gallery-grade marketing system for an AI creative-tools company.
trademark_signals: Cinematic dark photographic heroes ( over editorial stills) bookending crisp reading bands
A single proprietary sans (abcNormal) covering every typographic role, with tight negative tracking on display sizes
Black-only primary action language: every CTA is ( pill with corners and 14px/600 button text)
Five-tier neutral ladder ( → → → → ) carries the entire UI without accent colour
5-column pricing grid where the featured tier is signalled by a infill rather than a coloured border
ai_slop_avoided: Don't introduce accent colours (blue, green, red) into marketing surfaces
Don't apply drop shadows or glows to cards. Depth is photographic and tonal, not material
Don't badge the featured pricing tier with a coloured ribbon or border
